message:
fix(node): saturating arithmetic for .sum() overflow in mitigation_synthesis and counterfactual_replay

Replace plain .sum::<i64>() and .sum::<usize>() with saturating_add folds
to prevent silent integer overflow on unbounded/large collections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -284,7 +284,7 @@ impl IncidentLab {
         let adjustment: i64 = policy_diff
             .values()
             .filter_map(|v| v.parse::<i64>().ok())
-            .sum::<i64>()
+            .fold(0i64, |a, b| a.saturating_add(b))
             .signum()
             * -5;
